zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmond於1464年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克金薩爾時，他的父親Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond45歲，母親Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry33歲。他於大約1479年與Sheila MacCarthy結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1536年12月在愛爾蘭享年72歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭迪 本 克里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmond于1464年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 科克金薩爾时，他的父亲Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond45岁，母亲Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry33岁。他于大约1479年与Sheila MacCarthy结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1536年12月在爱尔兰享年72岁，埋葬在爱尔兰迪 本 克里。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzgerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmond was born in 1464, in Kinsale, County Cork, Ireland, his father, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond, was 45 and his mother, Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, was 33. He married Sheila MacCarthy about 1479. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in December 1536, in Ireland, at the age of 72, and was buried in Diocese of Kerry, Ireland.

fr.Caisleáñ Ui Chonaill, County Limerick, I: Caisleáñ Ui Chonaill, County Limerick, Irlande
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmond est né en 1464, à Kinsale, County Cork, Irlande, son père, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Sheila MacCarthy environ 1479. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en décembre 1536, à Irlande, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Diocese of Kerry, Irlande.

de.Caisleáñ Ui Chonaill, County Limerick, I: Caisleáñ Ui Chonaill, County Limerick, Irland
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmond 1464 in Kinsale, County Cork, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond 45 und seine Mutter Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry 33. Er hat um 1479 Sheila MacCarthy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb im Dezember 1536 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Irland und wurde in Diocese of Kerry, Irland begraben.

Lui sposato Sheila MacCarthy circa 1479. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel dicembre 1536, nel Irlanda, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Diocese of Kerry, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmondが1464年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクキンサルで生まれた時，父Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmondは45歳，母Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barryは33歳であった。約1479年にSheila MacCarthyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1536年12月にアイルランドで72歳で死去し，アイルランドディオセゼ オフ ケリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Caisleáñ Ui Chonaill, County Limerick, I: 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭 케이슬레an 이 초나이
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmond(이)가 1464년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 킨세일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1479년 Sheila MacCarthy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1536년 12월 아일랜드에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 디오스스 프 케리에 묻혔다.

pt.Caisleáñ Ui Chonaill, County Limerick, I: Caisleáñ Ui Chonaill, County Limerick, Irlanda
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmond nasceu em 1464, em Kinsale, County Cork, Irlanda, seu pai, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Sheila MacCarthy aproximadamente 1479. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1536, em Irlanda, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Diocese of Kerry, Irlanda.

ru.Caisleáñ Ui Chonaill, County Limerick, I: цеислеan уэи чонеилл, коунти лимирикк, Ирландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmond родился в 1464 г. в местности кинсеил, коунти корк, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Sheila MacCarthy около 1479 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер декабрь 1536 г. в местности Ирландия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности диосес оф кирри, Ирландия.

Se casó con Sheila MacCarthy aproximadamente 1479. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en diciembre de 1536, en Irlanda, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Diocese of Kerry, Irlanda.
